name: OnSecurityLocalQueryFreshness
title: OnSecurityLocalQueryFreshness
syntax: long OnSecurityLocalQueryFreshness(dword context, char pduName[], dword dataId, dword freshnessValueId, dword attemptNr, byte payload[], dword payloadLength, qword& freshness, dword& freshnessLength, qword truncatedRxFreshness, dword truncatedRxFreshnessBitLength)
description: This callback is called for every secured PDU for which a CMAC has to be calculated of verified.
The callback is triggered before the CMAC calculation starts.
The callback provides the possibility the calculate a freshness value in CAPL and force the Security Manager to use this freshness value for the next CMAC calculation / verification.

parameters.name: dword context
parameters.description: 1: PDU is received (CMAC verification) 0: PDU is transmitted (CMAC calculation

parameters.name: dword dataId
parameters.description: The data ID of the PDU.

parameters.name: dword freshnessValueId
parameters.description: The freshness value ID of the PDU.

parameters.name: dword attemptNr
parameters.description: The number of the attempted verification.

parameters.name: dword payloadLength
parameters.description: The payload length of the PDU in bytes.

parameters.name: qword& freshness [Out]
parameters.description: The freshness the CAPL code provides.

parameters.name: dword& freshnessLength [Out]
parameters.description: The freshness length of the freshness the CAPL code provides in bits.

parameters.name: qword truncatedRxFreshness
parameters.description: The received freshness (only in case context is 1).

parameters.name: dword truncatedRxFreshnessBitLength
parameters.description: The received freshness length in bits (only in case context is 1).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
